title: Sanitizers, Static Analysis, and Fuzzing · Object-Lifetime Lens: Static Analyzer Triage
summary: A security parser needs fast local feedback, nightly deep instrumentation, adversarial generation, and reproducible findings. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem static analyzer triage increment in layered memory-defect test matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run Clang and GCC static analyzers, preserve paths and assumptions, classify findings, and regression-test repairs.
Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer and fully instrumented MemorySanitizer environments for their distinct defect classes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Static Analyzer Triage · Theory Static Analyzer Triage
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 1584. Produce bounded C evidence to classify a defect against complementary native tools; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates.

steps.title: Build Static Analyzer Triage evidence · Theory Static Analyzer Triage
steps.instruction:
For this theory demonstration of cmem-static-analyzer-triage, write the complete compile-ready C program headed "/* Evidence: cmem-static-analyzer-triage-1cf528 */" for changed case 3806. It must classify a defect against complementary native tools, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails. Keep instant code within the PicoC 3.2.2 practice subset; do not claim C23, optimizing compiler, sanitizer, ABI, thread, operating-system, FFI, load, or production evidence until its explicit controlled transfer gate passes.
